{{CargoRelic
|name=Bloodthirsty Scroll
|class_id=20217
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=[[Must-Not-Name]] Rent
|description=Bloodthirsty Spell was used by the Orc Shamans and can inflict fanaticism on an allied unit, boosting attack and movement speed for 20 seconds.
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=29
|civ=12
|tech=18
|ss1=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail ATK +1<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss2=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail ATK +2<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss3=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
